overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city street in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning under an elevated highway, proceeding through a covered pedestrian walkway, entering a dark plaza with homeless encampments, and concluding with a view of towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements. The footage showcases futuristic neon-lit architecture mixed with urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street under elevated highway with neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the overpass looking out at the street and towering skyscrapers ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead with support beams
large rectangular digital advertisement screen displaying red content
tall futuristic glass and steel towers with corporate logos
tall palm tree lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. Neon billboards and towering skyscrapers dominate the view ahead, with palm trees lining the street. The camera walks forward along the concrete sidewalk, with the overpass structure providing partial cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: thick concrete support pillars and underside of the highway
metal and concrete benches along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along the covered sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass structure. The space is defined by thick support pillars on the left and the busy street visible on the right. Benches line the walkway, and a few pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level commercial area with vendor carts

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered plaza area with tents visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the street level passing vendor carts and approaching a covered plaza entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside a food cart on the sidewalk

entered.detail: mobile food vending cart with display items
painted white crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the street level past vendor carts and crosswalk markings. The overpass recedes into the background as the camera approaches the entrance to a darker covered plaza. Palm trees and commercial buildings line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with homeless encampment and food vendors

events.description: entering the darker covered plaza with artificial neon lighting and concrete walls
passing by camping tents and homeless individuals in the plaza corner

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered plaza area, passing tents and a food vendor stall

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt standing near camping tents
vendor attending a food stall with large branded umbrella

entered.detail: tall gray concrete walls enclosing the plaza space
makeshift camping tents and temporary shelters
food vendor stall with large white umbrella featuring branding
glowing neon signs for shops along the plaza wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dimly lit covered plaza with high concrete walls. Camping tents and makeshift shelters occupy the left side, while a food vendor stall with a branded umbrella sits in the center. Neon signs illuminate shop fronts along the right wall, and a few individuals stand or sit around the encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway transitioning to open street with towering skyscrapers

events.description: exiting the covered plaza back to the open street with visible skyscrapers
camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: walking out of the covered area and then stopping to look up at the skyline

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard with yellow background and face advertisement
row of commercial shop fronts with neon lighting
towering futuristic skyscrapers with glass facades and corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered plaza into a commercial walkway lined with neon-lit shop fronts, then emerges onto the open street. A large vertical yellow billboard dominates the right side. The segment ends with the camera tilting upward to reveal the massive skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and elevated highway structures towering overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered concrete of an urban overpass into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by walking along a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, where thick support pillars and benches frame a view of distant skyscrapers and palm trees. As the camera moves forward, the overpass recedes to reveal a street level filled with vendor carts and crosswalks before the environment shifts into a dimly lit covered plaza. This enclosed space, characterized by makeshift camping tents and glowing shop fronts, eventually opens back up into a commercial walkway dominated by a large vertical yellow billboard. The movement finally concludes as the camera tilts upward, transitioning from the gritty street level to a towering vista of holographic advertisements and soaring architectural structures.
